texto: I vow that from this day forward you shall not walk alone. My strength is your protection, my heart is your shelter, and my arms are your home. I shall serve you in all those ways that you require. I pledge to you my living and my dying, each equally in your care. Yours is the name I whisper at the close of each day and the eyes into which I smile each morning. I give you all that is mine to give. My heart and my soul I pledge to you. You are my Chosen One, you are my mate, and you are bound to me for eternity.
explicacao: Citação de Dana Marie Bell sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I vow that from this day forward you shall not walk alone. My strength is your protection, my hea…” articula amor, bond, dana-marie-bell em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e dana-marie-bell.

texto: Don't sound so grumpy. Next thing you know you'll be whinning and giving me puppy dog eyes.

texto: You are the sum total of what you have seen and learned, but underneath that is a core being, a usually untouchable being, that makes you who you truly are. It can make a person into a great peacemaker like Ghandi, or a serial killer like Ted Bundy, but it is immutable. That core holds both our deepest darkness and our greatest light. It’s the harmonies layered on top of that core melody that make us who we are from day to day.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Dana Marie Bell: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “You are the sum total of what you have seen and learned, but underneath that is a core being, a u…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, fantasy, romance pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e romance.
